source_name: Recommendation on Coordinated Implementation Roadmap for PQC Transition
requirement: Develop a comprehensive strategy for PQC adoption with clear goals, milestones, and timelines to ensure a coordinated transition across public sectors.
evidence_quote: This Commission Recommendation encourages Member States to develop a comprehensive strategy for the adoption of Post-Quantum Cryptography... The strategy should define clear goals, milestones, and timelines

source_name: Recommendation on Coordinated Implementation Roadmap for PQC Transition
requirement: Define a joint Post-Quantum Cryptography Implementation Roadmap to synchronize transition efforts among Member States and their public sectors.
evidence_quote: ...resulting in the definition of a joint Post-Quantum Cryptography Implementation Roadmap. This should lead to the deployment across the Union...
